summary: Iteration 37: Phase C Implementation Tests - Backend API Testing for Tasks 9-12 - 19/21 tests PASSED (90%), 2 SKIPPED (already approved status)

frontend_issues.note: Frontend is React Native/Expo - browser testing skipped per request. Backend APIs verified only.

critical_code_review_comments: Task 9 (Checklist NO additionalFields): VERIFIED via code review - frontend/constants/checklist.ts lines 48-61 shows prosthetic_phase has NO additionalFields (student_remark, faculty_remark, incharge_remark removed)
Task 10 (Final prosthesis visibility): PASS - final_prosthetic_plan field stored correctly and visible to all roles (student, supervisor, implant_incharge)
Task 11 (Case report PDF NO photos): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/case-report returns PDF (200) without photos embedded
Task 12 (Photo album PDF WITH photos): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/generate-album returns PDF (200) with photos embedded

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 executed tests passed, 2 skipped due to already approved status)
success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native/Expo - browser testing skipped per request)

seed_data_creation: Used existing procedure 69b7e23af7b13caee7644069 from iteration 36. Completed full flow through Phase 4 with final_prosthetic_plan='Cement Retained Crown - Zirconia'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C backend features fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) prosthetic_phase checklist in checklist.ts has NO additionalFields (Task 9 verified). 2) POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthetic stores final_prosthetic_plan, student/faculty/incharge remarks correctly. 3) final_prosthetic_plan visible to all roles (student, supervisor, implant_incharge) via GET /api/procedures/{id}. 4) Case report PDF (/api/procedures/{id}/case-report) returns PDF without photos (Task 11). 5) Photo album PDF (/api/procedures/{id}/generate-album) returns PDF with photos (Task 12). Procedure 69b7e23af7b13caee7644069 is now at status 'pending_stage2_prosthetic' with final_prosthetic_plan set.
